O0400F2 Number of Days Recreational Therapy Administered CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that recreational therapy was administered for at least 15 minutes in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
536 O0420_DSTNCT_THRPY_DAY_NUM O0420_DSTNCT_THRPY_DAY_NUM O0420 Number of Distinct Calendar Days of Therapy Administered CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of distinct calendar days that the resident received Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology
